Interface IRasterFunctionTemplate5

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a raster template function.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("6EC82E83-FC45-4609-841C-25BB07D9DB85")]
public interface IRasterFunctionTemplate5 : IRasterFunctionTemplate4, IRasterFunctionTemplate3, IRasterFunctionTemplate2, IRasterFunctionTemplate
